description: Look like the king of fashion with these casual boots from id. The contrast lacing adds to the class of the footwear, while the foamy footbed will keep you comfortable all day. This pair comes with an extra pair of laces, in case your fashion mood takes a swing!UpperFull grain multi-layered leather upper for maximum durability and styleTapered toe for comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitLightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug fitStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant rubber outsole for better shock absorptionShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
